## 6. Methodology

- Manual evaluation of all in-scope pages, states, and complete processes.
- Criterion-by-criterion checks using direct observation and assistive technology where required.
- Tool-assisted measurements, if any, manually verified and recorded with context.
- Status vocabulary: `PASS`, `FAIL`, `N/A`, `NT`, `BLOCKED`.
- Severity is based on user and task impact, not WCAG level.
